description: A visualizer to import data in MAGE-TAB format into GenePattern
author: Marc-Danie Nazaire(Broad Institute)
plan:
## MAGETABImportViewer GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
MAGETABImportViewer is a GenePattern module that A visualizer to import data in MAGE-TAB format into GenePattern

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 2 parameters:
- Required: sdrf.file, data.files
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>jargs.jar<path.separator><libdir>Jama-1.0.2.jar<path.separator><libdir>trove.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-modules.jar<path.separator><libdir>ant.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-modules.jar<path.separator><libdir>limpopo-1.0-beta-20100420.jar<path.separator><libdir>MAGETABImportViewer.jar org.broadinstitute.mage.MAGETABImportViewer -s <sdrf.file> -z <data.files>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.files
parameters.description: A zip file containing MAGE-TAB data matrix files - .zip
